step_rationale: Linked to immune deficiency and MI pathology; off-cascade.
mechanism: TES, associated with immune deficiency, contributes to myocardial infarction risk through systemic immune dysregulation separate from the atherothrombotic cascade.

references.title: Spontaneous Abortion and Myocardial Infarction: A Mendelian Randomization Investigation and Transcriptomic Analysis.
